project.title: FileCabinet
project.description: Local-first Windows desktop vault for retaining, cataloging, previewing, verifying, and recovering high-signal technical artifacts.

produces: docs/FileCabinet v1.4.1 — Headless Operations and Preservation Docs Release.md
consumes: User-selected files and folders for vault ingestion
Existing vault item files during rescan

datasets.name: FileCabinet catalog
datasets.description: Local JSON catalog containing vault metadata, artifact records, tags, categories, hashes, extracted text paths, thumbnail paths, activities, and UI preferences.

datasets.name: FileCabinet vault
datasets.description: Portable retained artifact storage containing items, thumbnails, extracted text, quarantine, and exports.

scripts.name: installer/build-installer.ps1
scripts.role: Publishes the self-contained Windows x64 build and creates the WiX MSI installer.

automation.deploy: Publish artifacts/installer/FileCabinet-1.4.1.0-win-x64.msi to the GitHub v1.4.1 release.
tasks: Build self-contained Windows x64 publish output
Include release notes from docs/FileCabinet v1.4.1 — Headless Operations and Preservation Docs Release.md

notes.release_name: FileCabinet v1.4.1 — Headless Operations and Preservation Docs Release
v1_4_1_highlights: Separate FileCabinet.Cli.exe automation surface for headless ingest, verify, search, export, report, repair-preview, repair, rescan, thumbnail rebuild, and package operations
Deterministic vault package export containing catalog JSON, catalog JSONL, retained items, thumbnails, extracted text, repair logs, and vault health output
Asynchronous WPF vault maintenance hardening for Analyze, Rescan, Apply Selected Repair Candidates, Hash Check, preview loading, extracted-text search, and quarantine count refresh
Preservation-oriented documentation for vault lifecycle, trust, determinism, local-first storage, repair, recovery, and context preservation
Application, CLI, installer default, and manifest version updated to 1.4.1
not_in_scope: Destructive cleanup of orphan generated assets
design_boundaries: Repairable local vault state over cloud dependency
notes.last_verified: dotnet test FileCabinet.Tests/FileCabinet.Tests.vbproj passed 61 tests on 2026-05-30; dotnet build FileCabinet.slnx --no-restore completed on 2026-05-30; installer/build-installer.ps1 -Version 1.4.1.0 completed on 2026-05-30
